mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate for future equity cash flows, directly increasing present valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening consumer demand and corporate earnings pressure, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with declining industrial production indicates inventory accumulation and weakening downstream demand, which suppresses corporate profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict negative returns with > 50% accuracy, or interaction term Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Surging housing starts during a late-cycle expansion signal overheating in the construction sector and impending monetary tightening, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Housing starts signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) specifically during late-cycle regimes, or forward returns remain positive > 60% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising corporate revenues, which supports equity valuations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Payroll growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns with > 52% accuracy, or Rank IC drops below 0.01 over rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index rises above 200, inflationary pressures force expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, increasing discount rates and triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 55% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 200, or threshold signal Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and industrial production confirms broad-based economic strength and robust corporate earnings growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Interaction term fails to yield positive returns > 55% of the time, or joint signal Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rebound in industrial production following a post-shock recovery phase indicates rapid capacity utilization and earnings acceleration, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Industrial production rebound fails to predict positive 5-day returns > 55% of the time during recovery regimes, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling windows.
